title: Mental imagery: The role of primary visual cortex in aphantasia.

assets.abstract: The neural underpinnings of aphantasia - a phenomenon where people have an absence of mental imagery - are poorly understood. Two recent studies provide the first direct evidence linking brain activation in primary visual cortex to the imagery deficits in aphantasia.

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Bridge paper score=22.5: links Imaginal concept to mechanistic neuroscience
